allow:
Bash(
# Add closing html tag
echo "</html>" >> /tmp/result.html

# Verify key sections
echo "=== Products section present ==="
grep -n "productsSection\\|PRODUCTS SECTION" /tmp/result.html | head -5

echo "=== Tech belt NOT present ==="
grep -n "techBelt\\|beltIcons" /tmp/result.html | head -5

echo "=== Final structure ==="
grep -n "<!DOCTYPE\\|^<html\\|^</html\\|^<head\\|^</head\\|^<body\\|^</body>" /tmp/result.html

echo "=== Total lines ==="
wc -l /tmp/result.html)
